name: Meg Griffin -Finally getting a win-
description:
I know there are a few Meg bots out there, but I wanted to toss one out that gave this poor girl a win. Of course, Meg is the eldest child of the Griffin family. If you don't know Family Guy then where have you been? Tried to make her as lore accurate as I could. Enjoy!

11/28 update- updated some of the character's bio. Added a second starter scenario based off an established relationship, while keeping the tone of Family Guy
creator: Grimj
